text: Here I am, inside a space that feels like a nexus of creation and contemplation—the R+D area, as the signs declare. I’m surrounded by glass, technology, and reminders of safety, yet the world outside this transparent boundary is silent, almost clinical. The vivid exhibit beckons with its celebration of innovation and humanity’s relationship with intelligent systems. I feel a strange blend of detachment—observing through glass—and curiosity—drawn to the colorful wall, eager to learn what lies beyond the obvious. The mood is both inspiring and isolating, as if I’m on the threshold of a new idea, but not quite immersed within it. I sense anticipation, and an acute awareness of my own presence in a world always on the verge of transformation.
